description: The worker submitted a completely fabricated summary describing non-existent functions (run_git_merge_to_main_inner, execute_phase_commit_task, PhaseCommitError::Hard/Transient) that do not appear anywhere in the codebase. The actual changes are correct but the summary is pure hallucination. A mechanism or policy should be added to catch or penalise workers that submit summaries describing code they did not write, since reviewers relying on the summary alone would be misled.
title: Worker summary hallucination policy enforcement
